steps.title: Read contracted as acquired
steps.content: Mr. Brooke is said to have contracted a too rambling habit of mind. Here, the word is used like contracting a condition: acquiring or developing it over time.

steps.title: Reject the wrong senses
steps.content: A means restricted, B means described, and D means settled or calmed. Those meanings do not fit a habit that Mr. Brooke acquired and continued to show. The answer is C.
